title: Extra Animations
description: Adds some missing animations to the game
body: # Extra Animations This mod aims to supplement and improve the vanilla animations in third-person gameplay. Some animation examples are shown below. ## Lantern Activated by holding lanterns ![Lantern](https://i.postimg.cc/pT8X97zp/lantern.gif) ## Compass Activated by holding compasses ![Compass](https://i.postimg.cc/yN1hN9Gx/compass.gif) ## Throw Activated when throwing projectiles ![Throw](https://i.postimg.cc/dQb8ygfb/throw.gif) ## Brush Activated by using a brush ![Brush](https://i.postimg.cc/SswzczZp/brush.gif) ## Magma Activates when taking fire damage ![Magma](https://i.postimg.cc/d32DdNk3/magma.gif) ## Levitation Activates when receiving the levitation effect ![Levitation](https://i.postimg.cc/15Kf3T1L/levitation.gif) ## Item Activates when you first receive a diamond ![Item](https://i.postimg.cc/rp56qBvk/item.gif) ## Water Activates when the player is submerged in water up to their head ![Water](https://i.postimg.cc/Gt7VMdsW/water.gif) ## Slow Falling Activates when receiving the slow falling effect ![Slow Falling](https://i.postimg.cc/RVY2KCm3/slow-falling.gif)
